name: codex-usage-overlay
description: A local macOS overlay that shows remaining Codex usage above the ChatGPT/Codex profile row.

interface.shortDescription: Show remaining Codex usage above the profile row.
interface.longDescription: A privacy-first macOS companion that reads Codex rate limits through the local App Server and renders a small overlay without modifying ChatGPT.app.
defaultPrompt: Install or troubleshoot Codex Usage Overlay.
